creator: ilya@martynov.org
text:
This is a port of gnus for emacs20. Version of gnus that comes with
	emacs is very old and particularly doesn't support internalization.
	There is exist port of t-gnus but I've found that it crashes my
	emacs on some messages. So i've decided to port original gnus. I've
	no access to emacs19 or xemacs so this port only for emacs20.
